MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN s;
MATCH (t:Train) RETURN count(t) AS totalTrains;
MATCH (p:Platform {id: 'PLT-101'}) SET p.status = 'CLOSED' RETURN p;
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog {id: 'ML-9921'}) DELETE m;
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Waterloo'})-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) RETURN p.id, p.status;
MATCH (t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey {id: 'JRN-102'}) RETURN t.id, t.capacity;
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P-554'})-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket {status: 'VALID'}) SET t.status = 'USED' RETURN t.id;
MATCH (r:Route {id: 'RT-05'})-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name ORDER BY s.stopOrder;
MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'ACTIVE'})-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime.truncate('day', datetime()) RETURN i.description, r.name;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.id AS passengerId, count(t) AS ticketCount ORDER BY ticketCount DESC LIMIT 10;
MATCH path = shortestPath((s1:Station {name: 'Kings Cross'})-[:CONNECTED_TO*..15]-(s2:Station {name: 'Paddington'})) RETURN path;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket {isValid: false}), (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) SET tc.status = 'SUSPENDED' RETURN count(tc) AS suspendedCards;
MATCH (j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) WHERE j.date < date() - duration({years: 1}) AND NOT (j)<-[:LOGGED_FOR]-(:DailyPassengerLog) DETACH DELETE j, t;

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:LOGGED_AT]-(d:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE d.date >= date() - duration({months: 1}) RETURN s.name AS stationName, avg(d.passengerCount) AS avgDailyPassengers ORDER BY avgDailyPassengers DESC;

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:PERFORMED]->(m:MaintenanceLog)-[:ON_TRAIN]->(t:Train)-[:INVOLVED_IN]->(i:Incident) WHERE duration.inDays(m.timestamp, i.timestamp).days >= 0 AND duration.inDays(m.timestamp, i.timestamp).days <= 7 RETURN DISTINCT sm.name, t.id, i.description;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOOKED_ON]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident {status: 'ACTIVE'}), (j)-[:STARTS_AT]->(start:Station), (j)-[:ENDS_AT]->(end:Station) MATCH altPath = shortestPath((start)-[:CONNECTED_TO*..10]-(end)) WHERE NONE(node IN nodes(altPath) WHERE node:Station AND (node)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i)) RETURN p.id, [n IN nodes(altPath) | n.name] AS recommendedRoute LIMIT 20;

MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE ts.date = date() WITH r, ts MATCH (tsPast:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r) WHERE tsPast.date >= date() - duration({days: 7}) AND tsPast.date < date() WITH r, ts, avg(tsPast.revenue) AS movingAvgRevenue RETURN r.name, ts.revenue AS todayRevenue, movingAvgRevenue, ((ts.revenue - movingAvgRevenue) / movingAvgRevenue) * 100 AS percentageDifference;

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:INCLUDES]-(r:Route) WITH s, count(r) AS routeCount WHERE routeCount > 5 MATCH (s)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform)<-[:CURRENTLY_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN s.name, routeCount, collect(p.number) AS platforms, collect(t.id) AS trains;

MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH r, sum(ts.revenue) AS totalRevenue MATCH (r)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(j:Journey)-[:USES_TRAIN]->(t:Train)<-[:ON_TRAIN]-(m:MaintenanceLog) WITH r, totalRevenue, count(DISTINCT m) AS maintenanceCount MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH r, totalRevenue, maintenanceCount, sum(i.severityScore) AS totalIncidentSeverity RETURN r.name, totalRevenue, maintenanceCount, totalIncidentSeverity, (totalRevenue - (maintenanceCount * 1000) - (totalIncidentSeverity * 5000)) AS profitabilityScore ORDER BY profitabilityScore DESC LIMIT 3;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t1:Ticket)-[:BOUGHT_AT]->(s1:Station), (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t2:Ticket)-[:BOUGHT_AT]->(s2:Station) WHERE t1.id <> t2.id AND s1.name <> s2.name AND duration.inSeconds(t1.timestamp, t2.timestamp).seconds < 600 AND NOT (p)-[:HAS_LOG]->(:DailyPassengerLog {date: date(t1.timestamp)}) RETURN p.id, collect(DISTINCT s1.name) AS stations, count(t1) AS rapidPurchases ORDER BY rapidPurchases DESC;
MATCH (d:Depot {name: 'North Depot'}) RETURN d;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard {status: 'ACTIVE'}) RETURN count(tc) AS activeCards;
MATCH (p:Passenger {email: 'user@example.com'}) SET p.lastLogin = datetime() RETURN p;
MATCH (s:StaffMember {role: 'DRIVER'}) RETURN s.id, s.name;
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'IN_SERVICE'}) SET t.status = 'MAINTENANCE' RETURN t.id;
MATCH (i:Incident {type: 'MINOR_DELAY'}) DELETE i;
MATCH (r:Route {id: 'RT-12'}) REMOVE r.temporaryDiversion RETURN r;
MATCH (j:Journey {status: 'COMPLETED'}) RETURN count(j) AS completedJourneys;
MATCH (p:Platform)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(s:Station {id: 'ST-01'}) RETURN p.number;
MATCH (t:Ticket {id: 'TKT-999'}) SET t.isValid = false, t.voidReason = 'EXPIRED' RETURN t;
MATCH (t:Train)-[:MAINTAINED_AT]->(d:Depot {name: 'East Depot'}) RETURN t.id, t.model;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard {type: 'MONTHLY'}) RETURN p.name, tc.expiryDate;
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date = date() RETURN s.name, j.id;
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.severity > 3 RETURN r.name, i.description ORDER BY i.severity DESC;
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(r:Route {name: 'Express Line'}) RETURN s.name ORDER BY s.stopIndex ASC;
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date < date() AND t.status = 'UNUSED' SET t.status = 'EXPIRED' RETURN count(t) AS expiredTickets;
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_BY]->(sm:StaffMember {id: 'SM-88'}) RETURN ml.date, ml.action ORDER BY ml.date DESC LIMIT 5;
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:LOGGED_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE dpl.date = date() - duration({days: 1}) RETURN s.name, sum(dpl.count) AS totalPassengers;
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE ts.date >= date() - duration({days: 30}) RETURN ts.routeId, sum(ts.revenue) AS monthlyRevenue ORDER BY monthlyRevenue DESC LIMIT 5;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:USES_TRAIN]->(tr:Train {hasWifi: true}) RETURN DISTINCT p.id AS passengerId;
MATCH path = (s1:Station {name: 'Airport'})-[:CONNECTED_TO*1..3]->(s2:Station {name: 'City Center'}) RETURN path;

MATCH (j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) WITH j, count(t) AS soldTickets MATCH (j)-[:USES_TRAIN]->(tr:Train) WHERE soldTickets > tr.capacity SET j.isOverbooked = true RETURN j.id, soldTickets, tr.capacity;
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:REPORTS_TO]->(mgr:StaffMember) WHERE mgr.name = 'Jane Doe' RETURN sm.name, sm.role;
MATCH (r:Route)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH r, count(s) AS stopCount WHERE stopCount > 20 RETURN r.name, stopCount;
MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'RESOLVED'})-[rel:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.resolutionTime < datetime() - duration({days: 30}) DELETE rel, i;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:OWNS]-(p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE tc.balance < t.price RETURN p.id, tc.balance, t.price;
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE NOT (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(:Route) SET s.status = 'INACTIVE' RETURN s.name;
MATCH (t:Train)<-[:ON_TRAIN]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WITH t, max(ml.date) AS lastMaintenance WHERE lastMaintenance < date() - duration({months: 6}) RETURN t.id, lastMaintenance;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:BOUGHT_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE t.timestamp >= datetime() - duration({hours: 1}) RETURN s.name, count(t) AS ticketsSoldHour ORDER BY ticketsSoldHour DESC;
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:STARTS_AT]->(s1:Station), (j)-[:ENDS_AT]->(s2:Station) WHERE s1.zone <> s2.zone RETURN j.id, s1.zone, s2.zone LIMIT 50;

MATCH (t:Train) WITH t MATCH (t)<-[:ON_TRAIN]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WITH t, count(ml) AS issueCount WHERE issueCount > 10 MATCH (t)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey) SET j.status = 'AT_RISK' RETURN t.id, issueCount, count(j) AS affectedJourneys;
MATCH (route:Route)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH route, collect(s.name) AS stations MATCH (route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) RETURN route.name, stations, collect(i.type) AS incidents;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[pur:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.price < 0 DELETE pur, t;

MATCH p = shortestPath((start:Station {name: 'Northwood'})-[:CONNECTED_TO*..20]-(end:Station {name: 'Southwood'})) WITH [n IN nodes(p) WHERE 'Station' IN labels(n) | n.name] AS stationNames RETURN stationNames, size(stationNames) AS hops;

MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:LOGGED_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, avg(dpl.count) AS avgPax MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(r:Route) WITH r, sum(avgPax) AS routeDemand MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r) WHERE ts.date = date() RETURN r.name, routeDemand, ts.revenue AS todayRevenue ORDER BY routeDemand DESC;

MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'ACTIVE'})-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station)<-[:LOGGED_AT]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog {date: date()}) WITH i, r, sum(dpl.count) AS impactedPassengers SET i.impactScore = impactedPassengers RETURN i.id, impactedPassengers;

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey)-[:USES_TRAIN]->(t:Train) WITH sm, count(DISTINCT t.model) AS modelsDriven WHERE modelsDriven >= 3 SET sm.certificationLevel = 'SENIOR' RETURN sm.id, modelsDriven;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WITH p, tc MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.timestamp > datetime() - duration({days: 30}) WITH p, tc, sum(t.price) AS monthlySpend WHERE monthlySpend > 200 AND tc.tier <> 'VIP' SET tc.tier = 'VIP' RETURN p.id, monthlySpend;

MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(plat:Platform) WITH s, count(plat) AS totalPlatforms MATCH (s)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(closedPlat:Platform {status: 'CLOSED'}) WITH s, totalPlatforms, count(closedPlat) AS closedPlatforms WHERE (toFloat(closedPlatforms) / totalPlatforms) > 0.5 SET s.status = 'SEVERELY_RESTRICTED' RETURN s.name, totalPlatforms, closedPlatforms;

MATCH (j:Journey {status: 'SCHEDULED'})-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident {type: 'TRACK_FAULT', status: 'ACTIVE'}), (j)-[:STARTS_AT]->(start:Station), (j)-[:ENDS_AT]->(end:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH alt = shortestPath((start)-[:CONNECTED_TO*..15]-(end)) WHERE NONE(n IN nodes(alt) WHERE n:Station AND (n)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i)) WITH j, alt SET j.status = CASE WHEN alt IS NULL THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'REROUTED' END RETURN j.id, j.status, [n IN nodes(alt) WHERE n:Station | n.name] AS newPath;
MATCH (t:Ticket {status: 'VALID'}) RETURN count(t) AS validTickets;
MATCH (p:Passenger {name: 'Alice Smith'}) RETURN p.email, p.phone;
MATCH (s:Station {zone: 1}) RETURN s.name, s.id;
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE r.type = 'NIGHT' RETURN r.name;
MATCH (sm:StaffMember {id: 'EMP-1234'}) SET sm.status = 'ON_LEAVE' RETURN sm;
MATCH (i:Incident {id: 'INC-001'}) REMOVE i.temporaryNotes RETURN i;
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog {status: 'PENDING'}) RETURN ml.id, ml.scheduledDate;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard {id: 'TC-9988'}) SET tc.balance = tc.balance - 2.50 RETURN tc.balance;
MATCH (d:Depot {capacity: 50}) RETURN d.name;
MATCH (p:Platform {number: 4})-[:BELONGS_TO]->(s:Station {name: 'Victoria'}) RETURN p.id;
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {name: 'Piccadilly'}) RETURN t.id, t.model;
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket {type: 'RETURN'}) WHERE t.purchaseDate = date() RETURN count(p) AS todayReturnPassengers;
MATCH (j:Journey {id: 'JRN-555'})-[:USES_TRAIN]->(t:Train) RETURN j.startTime, t.capacity;
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:ON_TRAIN]->(t:Train {id: 'TRN-777'}) RETURN ml.date, ml.description ORDER BY ml.date DESC;
MATCH (s:StaffMember {role: 'CONDUCTOR'})-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey {status: 'DELAYED'}) RETURN s.id, s.name;
MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED_BY]->(i:Incident {severity: 'HIGH'}) RETURN r.id, r.name;
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:LOGGED_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE dpl.date.year = 2023 AND dpl.date.month = 10 RETURN s.name, sum(dpl.count) AS octoberPassengers;
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:OWNS]-(p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE tc.expiryDate < date() SET t.status = 'INVALID' RETURN p.id, t.id;
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route {name: 'Circle Line'}) WHERE tss.date >= date() - duration({days: 7}) RETURN sum(tss.revenue) AS weeklyRevenue;
MATCH (s1:Station {name: 'Euston'})-[rel:CONNECTED_TO]->(s2:Station) RETURN s2.name, rel.distance AS distance ORDER BY distance ASC;
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:STARTS_AT]->(s1:Station), (j)-[:ENDS_AT]->(s2:Station) WHERE s1.zone = 1 AND s2.zone = 6 RETURN j.id, j.price;
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE NOT (t)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(:Journey {date: date()}) RETURN t.id, t.lastMaintenanceDate;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HAS_LOG]->(dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WITH p, count(dpl) AS daysTravelled WHERE daysTravelled > 20 MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) SET tc.loyaltyPoints = tc.loyaltyPoints + 100 RETURN p.id, tc.loyaltyPoints;
MATCH path = shortestPath((s1:Station {name: 'Richmond'})-[:CONNECTED_TO*..10]-(s2:Station {name: 'Stratford'})) RETURN length(path) AS stops, [n IN nodes(path) | n.name] AS route;
MATCH (i:Incident {status: 'ACTIVE'})-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(j:Journey {date: date()}) SET j.status = 'DELAYED', j.delayMinutes = i.estimatedDelay RETURN j.id, j.delayMinutes;

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:PERFORMED]->(ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:ON_TRAIN]->(t:Train) WHERE ml.date >= date() - duration({months: 1}) RETURN sm.name, count(ml) AS tasksCompleted ORDER BY tasksCompleted DESC LIMIT 3;
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(r:Route) WITH s, count(r) AS connectingRoutes WHERE connectingRoutes >= 4 SET s.isHub = true RETURN s.name, connectingRoutes;
MATCH (j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) WHERE j.startTime < datetime() AND t.status = 'BOOKED' SET t.status = 'NO_SHOW' RETURN count(t) AS missedTrains;
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH r, avg(ts.revenue) AS avgRev, max(ts.revenue) AS peakRev WHERE peakRev > avgRev * 1.5 RETURN r.name, avgRev, peakRev;

MATCH (t:Train)<-[:ON_TRAIN]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WITH t, max(ml.date) AS lastService MATCH (t)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey) WHERE lastService < date() - duration({months: 12}) DETACH DELETE j RETURN t.id AS groundedTrain, count(j) AS cancelledJourneys;

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH s, count(DISTINCT i) AS incidentCount MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:LOGGED_AT]->(s) WITH s, incidentCount, avg(dpl.count) AS avgFootfall RETURN s.name, incidentCount, avgFootfall, (incidentCount * 1.0 / avgFootfall) AS disruptionRatio ORDER BY disruptionRatio DESC LIMIT 10;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:USES_TRAIN]->(tr:Train) WHERE t.class = 'FIRST' WITH p, sum(t.price) AS totalSpent, count(DISTINCT tr) AS uniqueTrains WHERE totalSpent > 1000 MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) SET tc.status = 'PREMIUM' RETURN p.name, totalSpent, uniqueTrains;

MATCH (route:Route)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH route, collect(s) AS stations MATCH (route)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(j:Journey)-[:USES_TRAIN]->(t:Train) WITH route, stations, count(j) AS journeyCount, avg(t.capacity) AS avgCap WHERE journeyCount * avgCap < 500 RETURN route.name, size(stations) AS stopCount, journeyCount, avgCap AS averageCapacity;

MATCH (i1:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i2:Incident) WHERE i1.id <> i2.id AND duration.inDays(i1.timestamp, i2.timestamp).days < 2 WITH r, i1, i2 MATCH (r)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN r.name, s.name AS bottleneckStation, i1.type, i2.type LIMIT 20;

MATCH p = (start:Station {name: 'Heathrow'})-[:CONNECTED_TO*1..5]->(end:Station {name: 'Bank'}) WITH p, [rel IN relationships(p) | rel.travelTime] AS times WHERE reduce(total = 0, t IN times | total + t) < 45 RETURN [n IN nodes(p) | n.name] AS fastRoute, reduce(total = 0, t IN times | total + t) AS totalTime;

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:REPORTS_TO*1..3]->(mgr:StaffMember {role: 'DIRECTOR'}) MATCH (sm)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) RETURN sm.id, count(i) AS incidentsHandled, mgr.name ORDER BY incidentsHandled DESC;

MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:LOGGED_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE dpl.date >= date() - duration({days: 7}) WITH s, stdev(dpl.count) AS footfallVolatility, avg(dpl.count) AS meanFootfall WHERE meanFootfall > 10000 SET s.volatilityIndex = footfallVolatility / meanFootfall RETURN s.name, s.volatilityIndex ORDER BY s.volatilityIndex DESC;

MATCH (t:Train) OPTIONAL MATCH (t)<-[:ON_TRAIN]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WITH t, count(ml) AS maintCount OPTIONAL MATCH (t)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(j:Journey) WITH t, maintCount, count(j) AS tripCount WHERE tripCount > 0 AND (maintCount * 1.0 / tripCount) < 0.01 SET t.status = 'URGENT_MAINTENANCE' RETURN t.id, maintCount, tripCount;

MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH r, ts.date.year AS yr, ts.date.month AS mo, sum(ts.revenue) AS monthlyRev WITH r, yr, mo, monthlyRev ORDER BY yr, mo WITH r, collect(monthlyRev) AS revHistory WHERE size(revHistory) >= 2 AND revHistory[-1] < revHistory[-2] * 0.8 RETURN r.name, revHistory[-2] AS prevMonth, revHistory[-1] AS currMonth;

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey), (j)-[:STARTS_AT]->(s1:Station), (j)-[:ENDS_AT]->(s2:Station) WHERE s1.zone <> s2.zone WITH p, count(DISTINCT s1.zone) + count(DISTINCT s2.zone) AS zonesCrossed MATCH (p)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.maxZone < zonesCrossed SET tc.maxZone = zonesCrossed, tc.status = 'UPGRADED' RETURN p.id, zonesCrossed, tc.maxZone;
